rationale: The US-Iran ceasefire and resulting oil price drop continues to benefit Portugal through lower energy costs — no new qualitative change this cycle, baseline holds.

top_events.title: US, Iran confirm ceasefire; Strait of Hormuz reopening, markets soar, oil falls
top_events.summary: Falling oil prices and rising stock markets from the US-Iran deal benefit Portugal's energy-import-dependent economy and cost of living. Continuation of last cycle's development.

top_events.title: Tourist train overturns and injures 17 during Cártama tapas festival
top_events.summary: A tourist train accident in Cártama, Spain is geographically close to Portugal and touches the Iberian tourism sector, but is a minor local incident with no broader impact.

top_events.title: UK and Japan agree £18bn investment deal
top_events.summary: A UK-Japan bilateral deal is a distant trade story with negligible direct impact on Portugal's economy.
